description.zh: 稳定：快速、智能、灵活的多模态模型
description.en: Stable: fast, intelligent, flexible multimodal

description.zh: 最强：编码与智能体任务首选，适合日程与复杂推理
description.en: Best: coding and agentic tasks, ideal for scheduling

description.zh: 均衡：快速且成本效益高，适合日常对话
description.en: Balanced: fast and cost-efficient for daily use

description.zh: 最快：最经济实惠，适合简单任务
description.en: Fastest: most cost-efficient for simple tasks

description.zh: 轻量：快速经济，适合聚焦任务
description.en: Lightweight: fast and affordable for focused tasks

description.zh: 智能：非推理类最智能模型
description.en: Smart: smartest non-reasoning model

description.zh: 通用语音识别，兼容性好
description.en: General-purpose speech recognition, widely compatible

description.zh: 高精度语音转文字，基于 GPT-4o
description.en: High-accuracy speech-to-text powered by GPT-4o

description.zh: 轻量快速语音识别，基于 GPT-4o mini
description.en: Lightweight fast transcription powered by GPT-4o mini

description.zh: 预览：Frontier 级性能，以更低成本媲美大模型，支持代理与编码
description.en: Preview: Frontier-level performance at lower cost, agentic coding

description.zh: 预览：高级智能、复杂问题解决、强大代理与氛围编码能力
description.en: Preview: advanced intelligence, complex reasoning, agentic coding

description.zh: 预览：Frontier 级性能，最快最经济，适合高并发
description.en: Preview: Frontier-level, fastest and most economical

description.zh: 稳定：性价比出色，适合推理与低延迟任务
description.en: Stable: best price-performance for reasoning tasks

description.zh: 稳定：最先进模型，深度推理与编码能力
description.en: Stable: most advanced, deep reasoning and coding

description.zh: 稳定：2.5 系列最快最经济，适合简单任务
description.en: Stable: fastest and most economical in 2.5 series

description.zh: 预览：多模态音频理解，支持语音输入
description.en: Preview: multimodal audio understanding, speech input

description.zh: 预览：轻量快速音频理解，高并发场景
description.en: Preview: lightweight fast audio, high-volume workloads

description.zh: 稳定：多模态音频理解，支持语音输入
description.en: Stable: multimodal audio understanding, speech input

description.zh: 稳定：轻量快速音频理解
description.en: Stable: lightweight fast audio understanding

description.zh: 均衡：效果、速度、成本平衡，适合日常对话
description.en: Balanced: performance, speed and cost for daily use

description.zh: 均衡：Qwen3.5 升级版，支持思考模式与多模态
description.en: Balanced: Qwen3.5 with thinking and multimodal

description.zh: 最强：千问系列效果最佳，适合复杂推理与多步骤任务
description.en: Best: top capability for complex reasoning

description.zh: 最强：千问 Max，强推理能力，32K 上下文
description.en: Best: Qwen Max, strong reasoning, 32K context

description.zh: 最快：轻量快速、成本最低，适合简单任务
description.en: Fastest: lightweight, lowest cost for simple tasks

description.zh: 最快：千问 Flash，速度快、成本低
description.en: Fastest: Qwen Flash, fast and low-cost

description.zh: 长文本：最长 1000 万 token 上下文，适合长文本分析
description.en: Longest: 10M token context for long-text analysis

description.zh: 代码：擅长工具调用与函数调用，适合 Agent 场景
description.en: Code: excels at tool/function calling for agents

description.zh: 代码：轻量代码模型，速度快、成本低
description.en: Code: lightweight, fast and low-cost

description.zh: 短音频（≤5 分钟）同步识别，支持流式，适合语音消息
description.en: Short audio (≤5min) sync, supports streaming
